segments.title: Radix Hydration Patch Status and Shipping Decision
segments.summary: Peter asks about the status of the Radix patch. Justin confirms the deterministic `useId` wrapper is functional for Popover, Dialog, and Tooltip, despite being an imperfect solution. They decide to ship the fix for stability and create a migration note for the eventual upgrade to React 19, with the wrapper isolated in a utility for easy removal.
actions: Justin: Keep the `useId` wrapper in a small utility for easy removal.
decisions: Ship the 'ugly' `useId` wrapper fix for stability.
Write a migration note for the future React 19 upgrade.
segments.retrieval_summary: Decide to ship `useId` wrapper fix for radix hydration issue for stability and write migration note for future react_19 upgrade.

segments.title: Machinen Transcript Segmentation Bug Investigation
segments.summary: Peter brings up a transcript segmentation issue in Machinen. Justin suspects a problem with diarization, possibly due to KV lag or out-of-order webhooks. They discuss implementing a fallback to merge segments arriving within a short timeframe. Justin plans to add logging and potentially use in-memory caching to address KV lag, and will investigate after lunch.
actions: Justin: Add logging around the lane join step in the segmentation pipeline.
Justin: Investigate caching in memory to mitigate KV lag.
Justin: Investigate the segmentation pipeline after lunch.
segments.retrieval_summary: Investigate machinen transcript segmentation bug possibly caused by kv_store lag; Justin to add logging and explore in-memory caching as mitigation.

segments.title: Documenting Reproduction Steps for Radix Hydration Bug
segments.summary: Peter reminds Justin to document the specific reproduction steps for the Radix hydration bug: reload twice, then open a Dialog to trigger the mismatch warning. Justin confirms he has already captured this and will add the console output to the worklog.
actions: Justin: Document the reproduction steps for the Radix bug.
Justin: Paste the console output into the worklog.
segments.retrieval_summary: Document reproduction steps for radix hydration bug; Justin to add console output to worklog.
